generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are only meeting 1.5% of their defense spending commitments? Meanwhile, we're carrying the burden with 70% of the alliance's defense budget. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing. Our security shouldn't come at the expense of our own preparedness. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
